name: fortinet-waf
description: OctoBus package for Fortinet WAF online checks and IP list block/unblock APIs.

Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/BlockIP.name: block-ip
Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/BlockIP.description: Add an IP entry to a Fortinet WAF IP list.

Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/ListIPListMemb.name: list-ip-list-members
Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/ListIPListMemb.description: List Fortinet WAF IP list members.

Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
Fortinet_WAF.Fortinet_WAF/UnblockIP.description: Delete a Fortinet WAF IP list member by member ID.
